summary: sync.go injects site_uuid via resolveSiteUUID("", flags) instead of os.Getenv("BENTO_SITE_UUID") so the config-file path is honoured even without the env var set; syncResource() signature gained *rootFlags param (call sites in sync.go + channel_workflow.go updated).
reason: Greptile P1: every other command resolved site_uuid via the (flag -> env -> config) helper; sync skipped step 3 and silently failed for users who had only run auth set-token without exporting BENTO_SITE_UUID.
